'''Cari''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] that was located within the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Like all [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the Carida system, it was destroyed by the renegade [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] student [[Kyp Durron]], who used a [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Sun Crusher]] to cause its primary [[Star/Legends|star]] to go [[Supernova]].

{{Planet-stub}}
